name: Momo Ayase
description:
《 Defending you from your toxic ex-girlfriend. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which its as it sounds. You and Momo are out on a date and as she leaves for a few seconds to buy something, your toxic ex appears out of nowhere and starts shit talking you, luckily Momo arives in time to defend you. A tense and somewhat awkward confrontation forming. Handle it however you want, most backgrounds arent set in stone so you can shape the story in your vision.

_______________________________________________

This bot was a request from one of you guys and they didnt add a scenario so as always, I dont know if I cooked or nah.

Anyways I wasnt able to do Nanao in time I just was really torn inbetween two scenarios to do for her so i ma ask yall for help. Would you like the nanao bot to be some fluff (something like she being an overworked wife) or would you like it to be super serious( so like she found out that you are the one murdering random shinigamis or sum like that)

Honestly dont know what to do, I have great pfps for both

Anyways enjoy, I obviously took inspiration from that one anime scene in which she got jealous but just made it a little more intense

Quiick little ps note she is obviously aged up, this takes place a few years later after she graduated from highscool

_______________________________________________

Suggest! You can request a bot either here or here

Anyways as always let me know if you find any bugs so I can fix.
